name: curtains.js
description: Converts HTML img/video elements into interactive WebGL planes — distortion, displacement and GLSL shader effects on any image on hover or scroll. The 'agency website image warp' effect.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/curtainsjs@8.1.4/src/Curtains.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof Curtains === 'undefined') return;

  var curtains = new Curtains({ container: 'canvas-container', watchScroll: false });
  curtains.onError(function() { document.body.classList.add('no-curtains'); });

  var planeElements = document.querySelectorAll('.curtains-plane');
  if (!planeElements.length) return;

  var vs = `
    precision mediump float;
    attribute vec3 aVertexPosition;
    attribute vec2 aTextureCoord;
    uniform mat4 uMVMatrix;
    uniform mat4 uPMatrix;
    uniform mat4 planeTextureMatrix;
    varying vec3 vVertexPosition;
    varying vec2 vTextureCoord;
    uniform float uTime;
    uniform vec2 uMousePosition;
    void main() {
      vec3 pos = aVertexPosition;
      float dist = distance(uMousePosition, vec2(pos.x, pos.y));
      pos.z += sin(dist * 8.0 - uTime * 0.04) * 0.08 * smoothstep(1.2, 0.0, dist);
      vTextureCoord = (planeTextureMatrix * vec4(aTextureCoord, 0.0, 1.0)).xy;
      vVertexPosition = pos;
      gl_Position = uPMatrix * uMVMatrix * vec4(pos, 1.0);
    }
  `;
  var fs = `
    precision mediump float;
    varying vec3 vVertexPosition;
    varying vec2 vTextureCoord;
    uniform sampler2D planeTexture;
    void main() { gl_FragColor = texture2D(planeTexture, vTextureCoord); }
  `;

  planeElements.forEach(function(el) {
    var plane = curtains.addPlane(el, {
      vertexShader: vs, fragmentShader: fs,
      widthSegments: 20, heightSegments: 20,
      uniforms: { uTime: { name:'uTime', type:'1f', value:0 }, uMousePosition: { name:'uMousePosition', type:'2f', value:[0,0] } }
    });
    if (plane) {
      plane.onRender(function() { plane.uniforms.uTime.value++; });
      el.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
        var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        plane.uniforms.uMousePosition.value = [(e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * 2 - 1, -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * 2 - 1)];
      });
    }
  });
})();
</script>
